name: Tipsy Sweet Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Firmly packed light brown sugar
Pecan halves or marshmallows for topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F.
2. In a large bowl, combine mashed sweet potatoes, butter, brown sugar, and salt until well mixed.
3. Stir in the whiskey.
4. Spoon the mixture into a greased 1-quart casserole dish.
5. Top with pecan halves or marshmallows.
6. Bake for 20 minutes, or until bubbly.
7. Serve and enjoy!
